hero_title: Website for Online School in 5 Minutes

hero_placeholder: Describe what website you need for your business...

advantages.title: Course Catalog
advantages.description: Place training programs with descriptions, duration, prices, and enrollment form for each course.

advantages.title: Launch in 5 Minutes
advantages.description: Describe the online school and training directions — AI will create the site without programming or a designer.

advantages.title: Attracts Students
advantages.description: SEO optimization and enrollment forms help find new students in search and convert them into applications.

advantages.title: Visible in Search
advantages.description: Site is optimized for queries like "online courses", "training + topic" — students will find you on Google.

advantages.title: Grows With the School
advantages.description: Add new courses, programs, and teachers — the site scales without limits.

advantages.title: Reliable Platform
advantages.description: SSL, fast loading, and stable 24/7 operation — the site works without failures during peak loads.

how_it_works.title: Describe the Online School
how_it_works.description: Tell about training directions, target audience, and key courses of your online school.

how_it_works.title: AI Creates the Site
how_it_works.description: System generates a site with course catalog, program descriptions, and enrollment form for training.

how_it_works.title: Add Courses
how_it_works.description: Fill in course cards: program, duration, price, training format — students will see everything at once.

how_it_works.title: Start Attracting Students
how_it_works.description: Publish the site and start promotion — students will enroll through the form on the site.

faq.question: Can I place several courses on the site?
faq.answer: Yes. The course catalog allows adding any number of training programs with individual cards and prices.

faq.question: Does the site support integration with webinar platforms?
faq.answer: You can add links to Zoom, Google Meet, Stepik, and other platforms in course descriptions or on a separate page.

faq.question: Can I accept payments through the site?
faq.answer: In the basic version, forms collect applications. Payment system integration is available in extended plans.

faq.question: Is the site suitable for a foreign language school?
faq.answer: Yes. Describe the teaching language, format (individual/group), intensity — AI adapts the site structure for a language school.

faq.question: What is Promto?
faq.answer: Promto is an AI website builder. You describe your business, and the system creates a ready site with texts, structure, and design in minutes.

faq.question: How much does an online school website cost?
faq.answer: You can create a site for free. Paid plans add custom domain, extended analytics, and additional features.
